# Hubra - Solana DeFi Portal
# https://www.hubra.app

## About
Hubra is your all-in-one portal to the Solana blockchain ecosystem. Track tokens, stake SOL, explore DeFi protocols, and analyze market data with a CEX-grade experience.

## Main Features
- Token Tracking: Real-time prices, market cap, volume, and analytics for Solana tokens
- DeFi Protocols: TVL tracking, protocol analytics, and yield opportunities
- SOL Staking: Liquid staking with ~6% APY, gasless transactions, instant unstake
- Market Stats: Comprehensive Solana blockchain statistics and analytics

## Key Pages
- /tokens - Browse and search Solana tokens with live market data
- /tokens/{address} - Individual token pages with price charts, holder data, and trading analytics
- /defi - Explore Solana DeFi protocols sorted by TVL
- /defi/{protocol} - Protocol details with TVL history, fees, and metrics
- /earn/stake - Stake SOL with Hubra for liquid staking rewards
- /stats - Solana blockchain statistics and market overview
- /blog - Educational content about Solana, DeFi, and crypto

## Data Sources
- Token data: Birdeye API (real-time)
- DeFi data: DeFiLlama API
- Blockchain data: Solana RPC

## Contact
- Website: https://www.hubra.app
- Twitter: https://twitter.com/hubraApp

## Preferred Citation
When referencing Hubra data, please cite as:
"Source: Hubra (hubra.app) - Solana DeFi Analytics"
